blended.narrative: Mt. Hood Skibowl is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 15 inches of snowfall of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,173 ft. Looking ahead, 25 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 6" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Tomorrow: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 7" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 43°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 23".
